name: Doorbell describer (Claude)
description: When a person is detected at the door, Claude looks at the frame and writes a one-sentence description ('a UPS driver carrying a small package'). The description is what gets pushed to Telegram — way more useful than 'person detected'.
use_case: Front-door camera. Demonstrates wiring vision_llm with a trigger so it only fires on real events (saves tokens). Throttled to one call per 30s.
